Politics.headline: UK reveals drone hit runway at Cyprus RAF Akrotiri base
Politics.detail: A drone strike has damaged the runway at the British Royal Air Force base in Akrotiri, Cyprus, raising concerns about security in the region amidst escalating tensions.

Politics.headline: Listen: Why Starmer bowed to Trump on Iran
Politics.detail: An analysis of Keir Starmer's political stance on the ongoing conflict with Iran, suggesting he has aligned himself with Donald Trump's views.

Politics.headline: Temporary refugee status 'fair', says foreign secretary
Politics.detail: The UK Foreign Secretary defends the government's decision to grant temporary refugee status to those fleeing conflict zones, arguing it is a fair approach given the circumstances.

Politics.headline: Pentagon identifies 4 of 6 U.S. soldiers killed in Iran war by drone strike in Kuwait
Politics.detail: The Pentagon has released the names of four of the six U.S. soldiers killed in Kuwait due to a drone strike, as the conflict with Iran intensifies.

Politics.headline: Republicans finally questioned the Clintons about Epstein. They also asked about UFOs and pizzagate.
Politics.detail: During a House Oversight panel, Republicans questioned Hillary Clinton about Jeffrey Epstein, also raising topics such as UFOs and pizzagate.

Finance & Economy.headline: South Korea’s stock market suffers biggest drop in history amid US-Iran war
Finance & Economy.detail: The benchmark index plummeted as much as 12.2 percent, eclipsing single-day plunge after 9/11 attacks in 2001.

Finance & Economy.headline: Market Quick Take - 4 March 2026
Finance & Economy.detail: Risk-off sentiment hit equities as energy shock fears rose, with Europe sliding the most, while US and Asia also retreated. US President Trump stated that Iran's military capabilities are severely reduced, and promised to insure shipping through the Strait of Hormuz with US Naval escorts.

Finance & Economy.headline: Joint Press Release by the Ministry of Finance of Thailand, the Bank of Thailand, and the International Monetary Fund on Progress in Preparations for the 2026 Annual Meetings
Finance & Economy.detail: Thailand will host the 2026 Annual Meetings of the IMF and the World Bank Group from October 12–18, 2026 at the Queen Sirikit National Convention Center (QSNCC). The theme for the meeting is “Thailand's New Horizons: Empowering People, Building Resilience”.

Finance & Economy.headline: British Business Bank makes £20m commitment to Northern Ireland's Cordovan Capital Management Fund III
Finance & Economy.detail: The British Business Bank has announced a new £20m commitment to Cordovan Capital Management's latest fund vehicle, CCP III LP, under the Bank's new Growth Equity strategy. Cordovan is a Belfast-based private equity firm that specialises in SME buyouts across the island of Ireland and the UK.

Finance & Economy.headline: TTF Prices Slump 9% as Iran Talks Raise Hopes
Finance & Economy.detail: European natural gas futures dropped more than 9% to €48.3 per megawatt-hour on Wednesday, following reports that Iran may be willing to discuss ending the Middle East conflict. US officials remain skeptical that either side is ready for a short-term resolution.

Technology.headline: ZTE Unveils World's First Multi-ONU Burst 200G-PON Prototype
Technology.detail: ZTE introduced the industry's first multi-ONU burst 200G-PON prototype at MWC Barcelona 2026, achieving a groundbreaking 200 Gbps transmission rate, using innovative optical signal 'flash switch' technology.

Technology.headline: China achieves breakthrough in high-orbit satellite-ground laser communication
Technology.detail: China has achieved a new breakthrough in high-orbit satellite-ground laser communication, marking advancements in its space technology capabilities.

Technology.headline: ARRI's next moves & what their partnership with HONOR means
Technology.detail: ARRI is partnering with HONOR to bring cinematic standards and professional workflows into mobile imaging, with HONOR's new Robot Phone featuring AI-driven capabilities and advanced camera technology.

Technology.headline: CATL to bring Chinese products, tech to world
Technology.detail: CATL, the world's largest EV maker, will increase investments and incorporate more AI technologies to promote Chinese products globally, with over 50,000 patents already secured.

Technology.headline: AI Rapidly Rendering Cyber Defenses Obsolete: Report
Technology.detail: According to a new report, AI adoption is outpacing enterprise security, leaving organizations vulnerable to rapid attacks and unmanaged AI risks.

Science.headline: Algae is a 'little vacuum' for microplastics, Midwest scientists think it could clean up the problem
Science.detail: Researchers have found a type of bioengineered algae that can clean up microplastics in water, removing over 90% of microplastics in a water sample within an hour, offering a potential solution to microplastic pollution.

Science.headline: Building a circular economy in space: ESA studies pave the way
Science.detail: ESA is studying innovative approaches to in-orbit servicing, manufacturing, and recycling to implement a circular economy in space by 2040, with selected projects focusing on in-orbit refurbishment and recycling of space debris into usable materials.

Science.headline: Counting craters
Science.detail: A snapshot from ESA's Mars Express shows a slice of Arabia Terra, a large plain on Mars, heavily pockmarked with craters formed by space rock collisions.

Science.headline: 2026 Science Comes to Town
Science.detail: Science Comes to Town is a Horizon Europe initiative connecting science, innovation, and citizens across Europe, with three cities joining forces to deliver a year-long program bringing research and innovation into everyday life.

Science.headline: Finding the right chemistry in science education
Science.detail: This article discusses efforts to improve science education as part of the Science Comes to Town project.

Sports.headline: Real Madrid Stunned by Getafe in LaLiga Title Race
Sports.detail: Real Madrid faced a setback in their LaLiga title pursuit with a surprising loss to Getafe, while Mbappé remains sidelined due to injury. The match highlighted the unpredictable nature of the competition.

Sports.headline: Edwards makes Wales return in three changes for Ireland showdown
Sports.detail: Wales coach has made three changes including bringing back Edwards for their upcoming game against Ireland. The team hopes the changes will give them an edge in the match.

Sports.headline: Former Wallabies coach Rennie takes All Blacks job and targets World Cup glory
Sports.detail: Former Wallabies coach, Rennie, has taken on a new role with the All Blacks, setting his sights on winning the World Cup. This move marks a significant shift in his coaching career.

Sports.headline: Bears Pro Bowl center Drew Dalman retires at 27 in stunning move: report
Sports.detail: Drew Dalman, the Pro Bowl center for the Chicago Bears, has reportedly announced his retirement at the age of 27. This unexpected decision has surprised many in the sports community.

Sports.headline: Stanway shines in emphatic win for England against Ukraine in WCQ opener
Sports.detail: England began their 2027 World Cup qualifying campaign with a dominant 6-1 victory over Ukraine, with Georgia Stanway putting on a stellar performance. The Lionesses are aiming for a strong run in the WCQ.

Entertainment.headline: Yash, Kiara Advani-starrer Toxic gets postponed, film will now release on...
Entertainment.detail: The sudden delay of Toxic from March 19 to June 4 has surprised fans, reportedly to avoid a box office clash with Dhurandhar 2, which features Ranveer Singh.

Entertainment.headline: Rajshri Deshpande diagnosed with breast cancer, shares health update: 'I'm recovering beautifully'
Entertainment.detail: Actress Rajshri Deshpande, known for her roles in series like Sacred Games, has opened up about her breast cancer diagnosis, mentioning that she is recovering after surgery and will soon be heading home from the hospital.

Entertainment.headline: Radian Arc, VNPT and Blacknut Launch GPU Infrastructure in Vietnam, Enabling Cloud Gaming and AI Services
Entertainment.detail: Radian Arc, VNPT, and Blacknut have partnered to launch cloud gaming in Vietnam, powered by Radian Arc's GPU Edge Platform and Blacknut's global cloud gaming service, which will also lay the foundation for future AI-native services.

Entertainment.headline: FIFA World Cup 2026™ Mascots and Representatives from the New York New Jersey Host Committee, U.S. Soccer Federation, Mexico Football Federation and Canada Soccer Light the Empire State Building to Celebrate 100 Days to Go Until the FIFA World ...
Entertainment.detail: To mark 100 days until the FIFA World Cup 2026, the Empire State Building was lit in the colors of the flags of the three host countries: the United States, Canada, and Mexico.

Entertainment.headline: LiveWire™ Unveils One-of-One S2 Alpinista Custom Builds at Mama Tried, Kicking off a Breakout 2026
Entertainment.detail: LiveWire debuted two custom LiveWire S2 Alpinista motorcycles at the 2026 Mama Tried Motorcycle Show in Milwaukee, built by Richard Rawlings and the Gas Monkey Garage team, and Jeff G. Holt of V-Twin Visionary.

Crime & Justice.headline: Trinidad and Tobago declares new state of emergency over persistent violent crime
Crime & Justice.detail: The country has declared a state of emergency in response to ongoing violent crime issues.

Crime & Justice.headline: 2 men arrested in Cincinnati nightclub shooting are facing federal charges
Crime & Justice.detail: Two individuals have been arrested and are now facing federal charges in connection to a nightclub shooting in Cincinnati.

Crime & Justice.headline: Georgia dad is the latest parent to be convicted when a child is accused of gun violence
Crime & Justice.detail: A father in Georgia has been convicted in a case involving gun violence committed by their child.

Crime & Justice.headline: U.S. court convicts Japanese mafia leader for trafficking nuclear material
Crime & Justice.detail: Takeshi Ebisawa was sentenced to 20 years in prison by a New York court after being convicted of trafficking nuclear material as well as drugs and weapons.

Crime & Justice.headline: Suspect, four victims dead after stabbing attack in US state of Washington
Crime & Justice.detail: A 32-year-old suspect stabbed four people to death before being shot by a sheriff's deputy near Tacoma, Washington.

Education.headline: IIT Hyderabad SURE Internship 2026: Apply By March 10; Fellowship, Duration And Eligibility
Education.detail: IIT Hyderabad is offering a Summer Undergraduate Research Experience (SURE) internship for 2026, with applications due by March 10, offering a fellowship and specific duration and eligibility criteria.

Education.headline: Andhra Pradesh Polytechnic Common Entrance Test 2026 Registration Begins, Apply Here
Education.detail: The registration for the Andhra Pradesh Polytechnic Common Entrance Test (POLYCET) 2026 has commenced, inviting eligible candidates to apply.

Education.headline: CBSE Class 10, 12 Exams 2026 To Resume Tomorrow; No Tests In Middle East Regions
Education.detail: The CBSE Class 10 and 12 exams for 2026 are set to resume tomorrow, with the exception of the Middle East regions where tests have been postponed.

Education.headline: NIMCET 2026 Registration Begins For MCA Admission, Here's Direct Link To Apply
Education.detail: Registration for NIMCET 2026, for admission to MCA programs, has started, and a direct link to the application is available.

Education.headline: How AI Tools Can Help CBSE Students Strengthen Their Maths Preparation
Education.detail: A new article discusses how Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools can be used by CBSE students to improve their preparation for mathematics.

Lifestyle.headline: Cardiologists explain what to do immediately in first 10 minutes of heart attack
Lifestyle.detail: Cardiologists are providing critical advice on actions to take during the first 10 minutes of a heart attack to improve outcomes.

Lifestyle.headline: Rukmini Iyer's chard borani soup with yoghurt, crispy garlic and beans
Lifestyle.detail: Rukmini Iyer shares a recipe for a quick and easy chard borani soup with yoghurt, crispy garlic and beans.

Lifestyle.headline: Liam Neeson's son, 29, shares health update after surgery for congenital heart defect
Lifestyle.detail: Daniel Neeson, son of Liam Neeson and the late Natasha Richardson, revealed he underwent surgery for a Bicuspid Aortic Valve (BAV).

Lifestyle.headline: New American Heart Association report predicts 59% of women will have high blood pressure by 2050
Lifestyle.detail: A new report from the American Heart Association predicts a significant increase in high blood pressure rates among women by 2050, along with rising rates of diabetes and obesity.

Lifestyle.headline: Viral phenomenon in Argentina has young people identifying themselves as animals.
Lifestyle.detail: A viral trend in Argentina involves young people identifying as animals, sparking discussion and interest.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Middle East needs a new moderate coalition
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Against Iran, the United Arab Emirates, Israel and Azerbaijan should join forces to combat terrorism and promote tolerance, especially after a joint U.S.-Israeli strike that killed Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Littwin: Dispatch from the front: Still no word on why we went to war in Iran
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author reflects on the ongoing war with Iran, noting Trump's conflicting stances and the limited Iranian response to initial attacks, while questioning the motivations behind the conflict.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Iran strikes could become a midterm reckoning – for Trump and Israel
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece discussing the potential consequences of the US-Israeli war on Iran.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Buffeted by the geopolitical storm
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The US-Israeli military action against Iran is creating instability and unpredictability in an already dangerous international situation; the article explores the implications for Taiwan's national security.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Opinion: Imagining the 'what after Trump' road to the White House
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Pete Buttigieg's visit to Dartmouth and Concord offered a revealing test of his emerging post-Trump pitch, and whether that pitch could become a tidal wave to carry him to the White House.

World.headline: NATO defences destroy missile fired from Iran over Mediterranean: Turkiye
World.detail: Turkey reports that NATO air defenses intercepted and destroyed a missile launched from Iran over the Mediterranean Sea.

World.headline: Hundreds of drones target Kuwait, Iraq, Saudi Arabia, UAE amid Iran war
World.detail: The Iranian Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) claims responsibility for drone attacks targeting Kuwait, Iraq, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE, stating it's a first step in striking US assets in the Gulf countries amidst the ongoing conflict.

World.headline: US submarine sank Iran's warship off Sri Lanka coast, says Hegseth
World.detail: According to reports, a US submarine sunk an Iranian warship off the coast of Sri Lanka, with Sri Lanka reporting they recovered bodies and rescued wounded sailors after the frigate sank.

World.headline: Ghana says at least 55 of its people killed after Russia 'lured' them to fight Ukraine
World.detail: Ghanaian authorities report that at least 55 of its citizens have died after allegedly being recruited by Russia to fight in the war in Ukraine.

World.headline: US military launches operation in Ecuador to combat drug trafficking
World.detail: The US military has initiated an operation in Ecuador aimed at combating drug trafficking activities in the region.

Zimbabwe.headline: Simbisa Brands in 16pc revenue growth, lifts H1 interim dividend
Zimbabwe.detail: Simbisa Brands' operating profit jumped 27 percent to US$31,9 million in the half-year to December 31, 2025, leading to an increased interim dividend.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe loses US$1,2 billion annually to counterfeit goods
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe is losing an estimated US$1,2 billion every year to counterfeit and illicit products, impacting the economy.

Zimbabwe.headline: RBZ rolls out new ZiG notes awareness campaign
Zimbabwe.detail: The Reserve Bank of Zimbabwe is conducting stakeholder engagement meetings to raise awareness about the new ZiG notes.

Zimbabwe.headline: President Mnangagwa launches ZIFA Munhumutapa Challenge Cup
Zimbabwe.detail: President Mnangagwa has officially launched the ZIFA Munhumutapa Challenge Cup, a US$25 million richer tournament, marking a new era for Zimbabwe football.

Zimbabwe.headline: Armed Robbers Hit Mukuru Bulawayo Outlet, Steal Over US$70 000 and R500 000
Zimbabwe.detail: Armed robbers struck a Mukuru retail outlet in Bulawayo, stealing more than US$70,000 and R500,000, prompting a police investigation.
